title: Foundation of Probability Distributions
description: A hierarchical flowchart showing the building blocks of probability theory leading to random variables and their distributions
elements: Probability Theory Fundamentals (Sample Space, Events, Axioms)
Random Variable (Function mapping outcomes to numbers)
relationships: Probability fundamentals form the foundation for random variables
Random variables are categorized as discrete or continuous
Each type of random variable uses specific probability functions (PMF for discrete, PDF for continuous)
Both discrete and continuous random variables share the common CDF concept
